stories.title: **Headline:** Jackie Robinson Day 2026 — Dodgers Host Mets Tonight on ESPN, All Players Wear No. 42

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Today is Jackie Robinson Day. ⚾

Every player, coach, and umpire across Major League Baseball wears No. 42.

April 15, 1947. One man changed everything.

Tonight: Dodgers vs. Mets on ESPN at 10 PM ET — the perfect stage for today. #Jackie42 #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Dodgers vs. Mets — Jackie Robinson Day — ESPN, 10 PM ET. ⚾

Joe Buck. Ron Darling. Orel Hershiser.

The Dodgers are 17-4 on April 15 since this became a league-wide holiday.

That's not luck. #Jackie42 #Dodgers #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** Judge vs. Trout — The Greatest HR Duel of the Modern Era

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
April 13 gave us one of the best games of 2026.

Judge hit two. Trout hit two. Both are 3-time MVPs. ⚾

It was only the 4th time in MLB history two multiple-MVP winners hit 2+ home runs in the same game.

The last time? Roger Maris and Mickey Mantle in July 1962. #Yankees #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge's 47th career multi-homer game passed Mickey Mantle (46) for 2nd in Yankees history. ⚾

Only Babe Ruth has more (68).

He's at 6 HRs through 16 games. That's a 60-homer pace. And we're in mid-April.

Judge is playing out of his mind. #Yankees #MLB

research.facts:
Judge-Trout HR Duel April 13
**Status:** NEW STORY
**Tier:** 1
**Sources:**
- mlb.com (April 13, 2026): "Aaron Judge, Trent Grisham both hit two homers in Yankees' win"
- foxnews.com: "Aaron Judge, Mike Trout's home run duel enters MLB history books"
- nbcsports.com: "Aaron Judge vs. Mike Trout turns into starry slugfest of 3-time MVPs as Yankees edge Angels 11-10"
- mlb.com video: "Aaron Judge hammers two home runs vs. Angels | 04/13/2026" and "Aaron Judge's second home run of the game (6)"
**Key Facts (HIGH confidence — multiple sources):**
- Game: Yankees 11-10 Angels, April 13, 2026
- Judge: 2 HRs (first: 456-ft 2-run HR in 1st; second: in 6th inning — HR No. 6 of season)
- Trout: 2 HRs (3-run in 6th; solo in 8th)
- Walk-off: Grisham 2-run HR in 9th tied game; Caballero scored on wild pitch for walk-off
- Historic context: 4th time in MLB history two multiple-MVP winners hit 2+ HRs each
- Previous: Campanella/Musial June 1956; Maris/Mantle twice July 1962
- Judge's 47th career multi-HR game (2nd in Yankees history, surpasses Mantle's 46)
- Judge 2026: 6 HRs through 16 games
- Both Judge and Trout: 3-time MVPs
**Verification note:** Historical claim (4th time) sourced from foxnews.com and nbcsports.com. HIGH confidence with multiple major outlets.

stories.title: **Headline:** Orioles Manager Craig Albernaz Manages With Broken Jaw — The Toughest Man in Baseball

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Orioles manager Craig Albernaz was hit by a 70.6 mph line drive on Monday. ⚾

Result: broken jaw, 7 facial fractures.
No surgery. On baby food.

He managed the rest of that same game.
Then came back the next day — same spot.

That's a different kind of manager. #Orioles #MLB

Orioles Manager Craig Albernaz Injury

- yahoo sports: "Orioles manager Craig Albernaz has broken jaw, 7 facial fractures after getting hit by Jeremiah Jackson line drive"
- baltimoresun.com (April 14): "Orioles manager Craig Albernaz broke 7 bones and jaw on line drive to cheek"
- ESPN: "Orioles' Albernaz has cheek fractures, broken jaw from liner"
**Key Facts (HIGH confidence — multiple sources):**
- Hit by: Jeremiah Jackson's line drive during game vs. Diamondbacks
- Ball speed: 70.6 mph
- Injuries: Broken jaw, 7 facial fractures (right cheek)
- Did not need surgery; jaw not wired shut
- Diet: Baby food/liquid
- Returned to dugout DURING same game; Baltimore won 9-7
- Returned next day to manage, stood in same spot

stories.title: **Headline:** Brewers' Injury Crisis Deepens — Yelich Out a Month, Chourio and Vaughn Also Sidelined

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Milwaukee's April injury report: ⚾

Yelich — adductor strain, out 1+ month
Chourio — broken hand, out until May
Vaughn — broken hand, out until mid-May
Priester — thoracic outlet
Koenig — elbow

Six-game losing streak. Longest since 2003. #Brewers #MLB

Brewers Injury Crisis

**Key Facts (MEDIUM confidence — mostly single sources for specifics):**
- Yelich: Adductor strain, IL, expected return mid-to-late May (at least one month)
- Yelich stats before injury: .314 BA, 10 RBIs through 15 games
- Chourio: Hand fracture, expected return early May
- Vaughn: Hand fracture, expected return mid-May
- Priester (SP): Thoracic outlet syndrome
- Koenig (RP): Elbow
- Losing streak: 6 straight (longest since 2003)

stories.title: **Headline:** Ohtani Is Unscored Upon in 28.2 Innings — The 2026 Pitching Dominance Continues

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani: 28.2 scoreless innings as a pitcher. ⚾

Two 2026 starts. Both 6 IP, 0 ER.

On-base streak: 43 games — ties Ichiro's 2009 record for Japanese-born MLB players.

Pitching and hitting at the same time. #Dodgers #Ohtani #MLB

stories.title: **Headline:** MLB Stat Curiosities — Altuve's Monster Start, Gausman Strikeout Spree, Ben Rice Destroying Pitching

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Three absurd April stat lines to know: ⚾

• Jose Altuve: 265 wRC+ through 27 plate appearances
• Kevin Gausman: 21 Ks in his first 12 innings
• Ben Rice (Yankees): .362/.508/.745, 246 wRC+

These won't last. But for right now, they're real.

Early April is wild. #MLB
